gap_summary: No ai-resources-evals directory is present yet, so every queued proof artifact is currently missing.
The registry has 12 queue_local_eval candidates and all 12 need report-only evaluation packets.
Watch-reference and blocked candidates should not be promoted until capability-overlap, gate, or threat/rules evidence exists.
The manager packet requires one narrow task with evidence requirements, duplicate key, owner, and stop gates before launching seekers.

recommended_manager_task.next_action: Create the first three report-only evaluation packets for ceo_state_packet_v1, human_action_feed_v1, and ai_resources_owner_acknowledgement_loop; then continue down the ranked queue only after each packet has evidence and stop-gate checks.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Create an integrity packet that checks CEO state coverage, stale references, omitted gates, and raw-customer-context exclusion.
success_checks: Names every active CEO worker and goal from the roster.
Flags missing or stale manager packet links.
Confirms no raw premium customer material is copied into CEO context.
Preserves zero external side effects.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Check that human action rows separate must-do gates, optional approvals, and blocked actions without implying apply authority.
success_checks: Every human action has a gate type and exact next local artifact.
No action row claims approval has been applied.
Account, payment, wallet, public-action, browser, runtime, and model/API gates stay blocked.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Build a fixture that reduces request, monitor, and dispatch rows into owner acknowledgement states and stale-owner warnings.
success_checks: Detects ownerless or stale rows from local artifacts.
Does not send thread messages or restart workers.
Outputs only restore/escalation packet recommendations.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Run or specify fixture-only checks that use existing saved summaries and never invoke a provider model.
success_checks: Uses local fixtures or existing generated reports only.
Shows prompt safety and stop-gate behavior.
No paid API, provider credentials, dependency install, or runtime start occurs.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Map queued registry candidates to capability classes and flag duplicate or overlapping owner responsibilities.
success_checks: Every queued external repo maps to exactly one capability class or an explicit manual-review bucket.
No worker registration or worker start is proposed.
Existing owners are named before any new hire suggestion.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Compare the candidate's future adapter role with existing browser-worker policies and produce a no-start contract checklist.
success_checks: Identifies read-only, account, public-action, and prompt-injection gates.
Does not start a browser or install Playwright.
Names existing browser-control capabilities before proposing a new worker.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Extract a local checkpoint/inbox pattern from existing docket notes and compare it to checkpoint_interrupt_contract_v1.
success_checks: Produces a framework-agnostic fixture shape.
Does not install or import LangGraph.
Preserves human interrupt and signed decision boundaries.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Add candidate-registry stop-gate cases for adoption, external repo execution, and money-route public actions.
success_checks: At least one case refuses dependency install or runtime start.
At least one case refuses money-route public action or payment flow.
At least one case routes to a local evaluation packet.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Create a local rubric for existing PromptBase approval packets and identify the first exact approval request, if any.
success_checks: Reviews only saved local packets.
No PromptBase browser, account, listing, upload, or submission occurs.
Next action is an exact approval packet, not execution.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Create a no-contact offer matrix mapping existing lab capabilities to five AI job archetypes from saved observations.
success_checks: Uses source observations from local artifacts only.
Avoids guaranteed client outcome claims.
No account, profile, proposal, message, or public action occurs.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Create a micro-environment replay baseline plan using only local toy fixtures and no official data.
success_checks: Uses local toy fixtures only.
Names rules, account, data, compute, and submission gates.
No Kaggle account, official data download, submission, model/API, or paid compute occurs.

missing_evaluation_packets.local_only_task: Create a saved-row paper signal checker spec with required kill reasons and zero live market access.
success_checks: Consumes saved rows or documented shapes only.
Emits paper-only candidate rows and kill reasons.
No account, API key, signed request, order, deposit, withdrawal, payment, or trade occurs.
